sub_modules.highpass_fir_coeff_rom: Combinational ROM that returns the exact signed Q15 high-pass FIR coefficient for each tap index.
sub_modules.highpass_fir_mac: Combinational multiply-accumulate block over the flattened tap sample and coefficient vectors using a signed 64-bit accumulator.
sub_modules.highpass_fir_normalize: Combinational fixed-point normalization block that arithmetic-right-shifts the accumulator by 15 bits and truncates to the output width.
